rationale: Requires coordinating across teams to gather and organize existing docs into a structured guide. Needs an implementation plan with clear steps.
A departure checklist is a process document. Operations owns internal workflows and can integrate this into the offboarding process.
Product already owns the feedback collection. This is a recommendation to formalize the routing — PM needs to decide the format and cadence.
A meeting decisions template is a lightweight process doc that Operations can roll out to all recurring meetings.
Writing runbooks requires identifying top incident types, interviewing responders, and creating docs. Needs a sequenced plan.
The triage rotation is a structural change that needs buy-in from engineering leadership. A recommendation doc makes the case.
Before implementing estimation tracking, need to investigate what tooling exists and whether teams will adopt it. Needs research first.
